purpose: Read-only audit of Uniton_Shared_Live legacy state + gap analysis vs URL_REGISTRY tier-1 expectations + NTS Live Ledger vision (every task done → live log)

phases_skipped_with_reason.D: skipped per task spec time-box (≤30 min on Phase D); content patterns characterized via Phase C header sampling instead

executive_summary.activity_30d_breakdown: 74 by AIER Code Sync Bot + 1 by Uniton Future

top_3_gaps.gap: Sync workflow has not run since 2026-04-28T19:33Z. 28+ qualifying pushes on 2026-04-29 did not trigger sync.
top_3_gaps.root_cause_hypothesis: GitHub Actions default GITHUB_TOKEN cannot trigger downstream workflows on push (anti-loop protection). Auto-status + heartbeat workflows commit using default token → sync downstream blocked. Recent PR merges happened but their diffs touched docs/scripts (not in sync paths-filter), so they don't trigger either.
top_3_gaps.evidence: gh run list --workflow=sync_runtime_to_public.yml shows last 15 runs all on 2026-04-28; current Uniton_Shared HEAD 32701083 vs last sync source 9798af2 (28 commits behind)

top_3_gaps.gap: No task-log surface synced. /reports/, /audit_logs/, /snapshots/, /handoffs/ are NOT in whitelist, so finished task artifacts are not publicly visible.
top_3_gaps.evidence: Folder presence check Phase F: 11 of 14 critical Uniton_Shared dirs missing in Live; the missing 4 task-log dirs are most relevant to NTS vision.

top_3_gaps.gap: No AIER status / decision ledger / deploy state surfaces. UDNA marker, heartbeat ledger, NTS_DECISION packets all live elsewhere; none reachable via Live mirror.
top_3_gaps.evidence: Uniton_Shared_Live has only 3 top-level dirs (runtime, notifications, network) + README + SYNC_INFO. Missing aier-status/, ledger/, status/ namespaces.

what_works: 7-file runtime mirror is the right primitive for V0
Whitelist by design is correct (canon/code stays private)
Bot identity distinguishable in git log
All 7 expected tier-1 files exist with real content
what_missing: AIER status surface (UDNA, heartbeat ledger, brain pointers)
what_outdated: All synced files reflect Uniton_Shared HEAD 9798af2 (2026-04-28T19:33Z)
auto_project_status workflow generating fresh content; sync workflow not picking it up
what_unclear: Whether bot push commits are explicitly excluded by hidden filter
Whether [vercel skip] marker has Actions side-effect
Whether anyone noticed the auto-trigger break

A_keep_augment.summary: Keep 7-file whitelist; ALSO add task-log surfaces; fix chained trigger.

B_migrate.summary: Keep 7-file mirror as runtime/ block. Add tasks/, logs/, ledger/, status/, aier-status/. Fix trigger.

claco_recommendation.rationale: 7-file runtime/ mirror works architecturally; only sync trigger is broken (fixable). NTS vision adds layers, not replaces — Option A becomes paths-filter monster; Option C breaks URL_REGISTRY tier-1. Option B keeps runtime/* URLs stable + adds new namespaces matching natural growth pattern (each top-level dir = one concern).

rejected_overkill: aier-status/aier-ops/ (cross-AIER goes through Bridge, not file mirror)

critical_fix_required_regardless_of_opti.title: Chained-workflow trigger fix
options: Use PAT (Personal Access Token) for auto_project_status push instead of default GITHUB_TOKEN
Use repository_dispatch event chain (auto_project_status fires repository_dispatch → sync listens for it)
Add workflow_run trigger to sync workflow (listens for auto_project_status completion)
critical_fix_required_regardless_of_opti.blocking_for: All 3 options (A/B/C) — without this fix, no sync ever fires from auto-regen pushes

boundary_check.no_modify_uniton_shared_live: PASS — only git pull, git log, find, cat used
